title: UBG
body:
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp)
# https://www.bisecthosting.com/btxdxd

### Mod inspired by PointBlank and World of Tanks/Mir Tankov
This mod adds author's weapons. Each weapon has its own characteristics. The mod does not have gun calibers, but instead it has different shells that are not suitable for all guns.

The muzzle of the weapon in the mod can break after a shot with a certain chance.

The characteristics and features of each weapon are presented below.

_THE NAMES OF COUNTRIES HAVE NOTHING TO DO WITH POLITICS!_
|Gun|Country|Type|Reload speed|Damage|Ammo count|Ammo types|Firing range|Chance of weapon failure|Cooling|Features|
|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|-|
|Spegel A26 B4 C3|SE|Heavy gun|1s/20s|36/75|2|E|inf|4%|-|2x shoot, Auto reload|
|Murskata-4|FI|Shotgun|2s/3s|2-14; 6|4|HEF, SC|inf|1%|-|-|
|Вейлар ББ i-7|RU|Rocket launcher|5s|-|1|R|1.5x|2%|-|Explodes instantly [!]|
|Luftschuss Auswahl|DE|Shotgun|1s/2s|-|1|CAI|inf|2%|-|Push entities|
|Brûler-C m2|FR|Machine gun|0,5s/3,5s|3+Fire(100%)|30 (3L)|GT|2x|2%/8%/20%|0,5s/100°C|Heating|

Reload speed is represented as follows: `reload between shots/full reload or full reload`

> HEF shells deal random damage within a certain range
> 
> (SC) Sub-caliber shells always deal the same, but average damage
> 
> (C) Cumulative shells deal damage and set fire with a certain chance
> 
> (E) Electric shells deal high damage
> 
> (R) Rocket explodes
>
> (CAI) Compressed air box pushes enemies further than a normal projectile
>
> (GT) Gasoline Tank contains a flammable mixture to fry enemies

Firing range is measured in the distance a bow can shoot.

Cooling shows the following: `cooling rate/maximum allowable temperature`
